subtasks.description: Query license data grouped by publisher. Calculate total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher.

plan.cost_rationale: Single straightforward aggregation query with GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, and AVG functions on one data source (licenses table). No multi-CTE complexity, no cross-source reconciliation, no policy evaluation needed. Small tier sufficient for this standard SQL aggregation task.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) as avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) as license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
